settings.heading: Still need help?
settings.description:
Shoot our team an email & we’ll get
back to you ASAP

settings.title: How long does it take to process an order?
settings.content: Order processing times vary depending on the product and location. Typically, it takes 1-3 business days to process an order before it is shipped. You will receive a confirmation email with tracking details once your order has been dispatched.

settings.title: How long will it take to ship my order?
settings.content: Shipping times vary depending on your location and the shipping method selected. Typically, orders are processed within [X] business days and delivered within [X] to [X] days. You will receive a tracking number once your order has shipped.

settings.title: What is your return policy?
settings.content: Our return policy allows returns within [X] days of purchase, as long as the item is unused and in its original packaging. Some exclusions may apply. Please visit our Return Policy page for full details.

settings.title: How do I choose the right size?
settings.content: We recommend checking our size chart for detailed measurements and fit guidance. If you’re unsure, feel free to reach out for assistance.

settings.title: What are your sizing options?
settings.content: We offer a variety of sizing options, ranging from [XS to XXL] (or custom sizes depending on the product). Please check our size chart for exact measurements and guidance on finding the best fit.

settings.heading: Discover more in our FAQ
settings.description:
Have a question or comment? Don't be shy: Reach out and say hi!
Support hours: Monday-Friday, 7am-3pm
